title: astragalus austromahneshanensis
intro: Astragalus austromahneshanensis, a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is a type of astragalus that is native to Iran. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits associated with Astragalus austromahneshanensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus austromahneshanensis is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
